title: APPLiA Statistical Reports — European Home Appliance Industry (production, sales, trade by country)
countries: and other EU/EFTA members covered in APPLiA member country tables
time_coverage: 2018–2024 (varies by report edition; each PDF covers roughly a 2-year window plus historical trend charts)
units: described within each PDF (units, volumes, EUR value) — not machine-readable, tables embedded in PDF text/images
license_terms: APPLiA public report; no explicit open license stated on site — used for reference/research per project source-hygiene rules (industry association primary publication, not excluded category)
notes: Filenames given directly by task; each PDF verified via `file` as a real PDF document (not an HTML error page). 2023-2024 and 2022-2023 are PDF 1.6 (zip-deflate encoded); 2020-21 is PDF 1.4. Content not yet extracted/parsed — raw PDFs only. Editions requested were the 3 most recent per task instructions (2023-2024, 2022-2023, 2020-21); no 2021-2022 edition URL was provided/requested.
